title: melica ramosa subsp. saxatilis
intro: Melica ramosa subsp. saxatilis, also known as mountain melick, is a perennial plant species in the grass family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, which help relieve respiratory issues and soothe irritated tissues. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating coughs, and providing antioxidant properties. Melica ramosa subsp. saxatilis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
